<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Intervention\Image\Drivers\Gd\Modifiers; use Intervention\Image\Interfaces\ImageInterface; use Intervention\Image\Interfaces\SpecializedInterface; use Intervention\Image\Modifiers\ResizeCanvasModifier as GenericResizeCanvasModifier; class ResizeCanvasModifier extends GenericResizeCanvasModifier implements SpecializedInterface { /** * {@inheritdoc} * * @see ModifierInterface::apply() */ public function apply(ImageInterface $image): ImageInterface { $cropSize = $this->cropSize($image); $image->modify(new CropModifier( $cropSize->width(), $cropSize->height(), $cropSize->pivot()->x(), $cropSize->pivot()->y(), $this->background, )); return $image; } }
